user_query: There's no rate limiting on the POST /v1/run endpoint in apps/worker/src/routes/run.ts. A single user can submit hundreds of agent runs per minute, exhausting our Cloudflare Worker CPU quota. Implement a per-IP rate limit using the Cloudflare KV binding RATE_LIMIT_KV: allow at most 20 requests per minute per IP, returning 429 Too Many Requests with a Retry-After header when the limit is exceeded.
